name: seedspec
description: Protocol, reference runtime, CLI, conformance suite, and authoring tools for SeedSpec

scripts.validate:examples: node ./packages/cli/bin/seedspec.js validate ./examples/allowance-tracker && node ./packages/cli/bin/seedspec.js validate ./examples/savings-goals && node ./packages/cli/bin/seedspec.js validate ./examples/chore-streaks
scripts.check: npm run check:names && npm test && npm run validate:examples
